events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Given only a single-angle photo with the permit, fire-watch evidence, and clearance/shielding details outside the frame, I couldn't confirm compliance with NFPA 51B / OSHA 1926 Subpart J — so the decision is `needs_more_info` (medium risk) with specific follow-up actions (additional photos, permit confirmation, fire watch verification, documented clearance distances).
